'''holadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoidiophilous|zoidiophilous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoidiophilous|zoidiophilous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| holadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:holadhithi|holadhithi]] || [[word:holadhiji|holadhiji]] || [[word:holadhishi|holadhishi]] || [[word:holadhiki|holadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:holadhuthuthu|holadhuthuthu]] || [[word:holadhujuju|holadhujuju]] || [[word:holadhushushu|holadhushushu]] || [[word:holadhukuku|holadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:holadhuthu|holadhuthu]] || [[word:holadhuju|holadhuju]] || [[word:holadhushu|holadhushu]] || [[word:holadhuku|holadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:holadhufthuf|holadhufthuf]] || [[word:holadhufjuf|holadhufjuf]] || [[word:holadhufshuf|holadhufshuf]] || [[word:holadhufkuf|holadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:holadhethe|holadhethe]] || [[word:holadheje|holadheje]] || [[word:holadheshe|holadheshe]] || [[word:holadheke|holadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:holadhothotho|holadhothotho]] || [[word:holadhojojo|holadhojojo]] || [[word:holadhoshosho|holadhoshosho]] || [[word:holadhokoko|holadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:holadhotho|holadhotho]] || [[word:holadhojo|holadhojo]] || [[word:holadhosho|holadhosho]] || [[word:holadhoko|holadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:holadhofthof|holadhofthof]] || [[word:holadhofjof|holadhofjof]] || [[word:holadhofshof|holadhofshof]] || [[word:holadhofkof|holadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:holadhïfthïf|holadhïfthïf]] || [[word:holadhïfjïf|holadhïfjïf]] || [[word:holadhïfshïf|holadhïfshïf]] || [[word:holadhïfkïf|holadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:holadhïfthïfthïf|holadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:holadhïfjïfjïf|holadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:holadhïfshïfshïf|holadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:holadhïfkïfkïf|holadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:holadhïfthïf|holadhïfthïf]] || [[word:holadhïfjïf|holadhïfjïf]] || [[word:holadhïfshïf|holadhïfshïf]] || [[word:holadhïfkïf|holadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:holadhïfthïf|holadhïfthïf]] || [[word:holadhïfjïf|holadhïfjïf]] || [[word:holadhïfshïf|holadhïfshïf]] || [[word:holadhïfkïf|holadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:holadhæthæ|holadhæthæ]] || [[word:holadhæjæ|holadhæjæ]] || [[word:holadhæshæ|holadhæshæ]] || [[word:holadhækæ|holadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:holadhathatha|holadhathatha]] || [[word:holadhajaja|holadhajaja]] || [[word:holadhashasha|holadhashasha]] || [[word:holadhakaka|holadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:holadhatha|holadhatha]] || [[word:holadhaja|holadhaja]] || [[word:holadhasha|holadhasha]] || [[word:holadhaka|holadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:holadhafthaf|holadhafthaf]] || [[word:holadhafjaf|holadhafjaf]] || [[word:holadhafshaf|holadhafshaf]] || [[word:holadhafkaf|holadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:holadhasha|holadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:holadhshësha|holadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holadhrosha|holadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holadhmusha|holadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:holadhyasha|holadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholadhnkshësha|goholadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholadhnkrosha|goholadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholadhnkmusha|goholadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholadhnkyasha|goholadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:holaladhasha|holaladhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holaladhshësha|holaladhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holaladhrosha|holaladhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holaladhmusha|holaladhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holaladhyasha|holaladhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholaladhnkshësha|goholaladhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholaladhnkrosha|goholaladhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholaladhnkmusha|goholaladhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholaladhnkyasha|goholaladhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:helædhasha|helædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:helædhshësha|helædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:helædhrosha|helædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:helædhmusha|helædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:helædhyasha|helædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohelædhnkshësha|gohelædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohelædhnkrosha|gohelædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohelædhnkmusha|gohelædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohelædhnkyasha|gohelædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:holfadhasha|holfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holfadhshësha|holfadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holfadhrosha|holfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holfadhmusha|holfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holfadhyasha|holfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholfadhnkshësha|goholfadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholfadhnkrosha|goholfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholfadhnkmusha|goholfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholfadhnkyasha|goholfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
